hero.title: We build software.
hero.subtitle: We create digital products that solve real problems. From management platforms to AI-powered intelligent assistants.

benefits.title: Why NovaPage?
benefits.customDesc: Every line of code has a purpose. We build software that is used, maintained, and scales.
benefits.aiDesc: We use the right tools for every problem. AI, cloud, automation — whatever the product needs.
benefits.secureDesc: Cloud infrastructure, clean code, automated testing. That's how we build from day one.

about.title: Who we are
about.description: NovaPage is a Colombian software company. We build digital products — from trading platforms to intelligent AI assistants. Born in Colombia, operating remotely, and our strength is well-thought-out architecture.
about.founder: Founded by César Pérez, software architect.

projects.title: Our products
projects.intro: This is what we've built. Each product solves a specific problem with the right technology.
projects.privacy: Some projects are not shown due to confidentiality agreements.

web.title: Software Development
web.intro: We build complete web applications and platforms. Software is our craft — from an API to a full system with frontend, backend, and database.

items.title: Complete web applications
items.desc: Platforms with frontend, backend, database, and authentication. Ready to use, ready to scale.

items.title: APIs and microservices
items.desc: Backends designed to be fast, secure, and easy to maintain. Documentation included.

items.title: Dashboards and control panels
items.desc: Interfaces to visualize data, monitor operations, and make real-time decisions.

items.title: Landing pages and corporate websites
items.desc: Professional web presence, optimized for performance and conversion.

items.title: Progressive Web Applications (PWA)
items.desc: Applications that work offline, with notifications and native experience from the browser.

items.title: Modern stack
items.desc: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Python/FastAPI, Tailwind CSS, Supabase, Azure. We choose the tool based on the problem.

items.title: Clean architecture
items.desc: Modular code, static types, automated testing. This is how we avoid technical debt from the start.

items.title: Integrations
items.desc: APIs, payment gateways, WhatsApp, CRM, ERP. We connect your software with what you already use.

items.title: Testing and quality
items.desc: Unit, integration, and interface testing. Every deploy passes automated validation.

items.title: Deployment and operations
items.desc: Cloud, VPS, or your preferred provider. We make sure the product is online and working.

items.title: Proven experience
items.desc: We've built trading platforms, AI assistants, management systems, and more.

items.title: Code that scales
items.desc: We don't make prototypes. We make products that can grow with the business.

items.title: No fluff
items.desc: We tell you if something works, makes sense, or if there's a better approach. We don't sell smoke.

automation.title: Koda — CRM + Intelligent Scheduling
automation.intro: Koda is a NovaPage product. It unifies lead capture, appointment scheduling, and Meta Ads campaign management in one place. Designed for business owners.

items.title: Automated lead capture
items.desc: Clients come from your landing page, social media, or WhatsApp. Koda organizes them automatically.

items.title: Intelligent scheduling
items.desc: Your clients book appointments without calls. Koda sends reminders and prevents cancellations.

items.title: Integrated Meta Ads campaigns
items.desc: Manage your ads from the same panel where you see your leads. No switching tools.

items.title: Live dashboard
items.desc: See in real time how many leads came in, how many converted, and where to focus your attention.

items.title: Business owners
items.desc: Gyms, clinics, offices, workshops — any business that receives clients and needs to get organized.

items.title: Small teams
items.desc: No tech department needed. Koda runs on its own, you just use it.

items.title: Koda can be used standalone
items.desc: As an independent product. No commitment, no long contract.

items.title: Koda within EMPIRE
items.desc: If you need a full website + ads + Koda, the EMPIRE package includes everything.

ai.title: Artificial Intelligence (Applied Research)
ai.intro: We explore multi-agent systems, conversational assistants, and AI-powered automation. Applied research — we build, test, and learn.
ai.desc: Autogen, CrewAI, LangChain, OpenAI, Gemini. We use the right tools for each experiment.

items.title: Multi-agent systems (Evana)
items.desc: AI agents that collaborate to solve complex tasks. Automation with human supervision.

items.title: Conversational assistants
items.desc: Chatbots and assistants for web, WhatsApp, and internal channels. With natural language.

items.title: Intelligent automation
items.desc: Systems that analyze data, generate reports, and make decisions based on AI models.

items.title: Agent frameworks
items.desc: Autogen, CrewAI, LangChain — to orchestrate multi-agent systems.

items.title: Language models
items.desc: OpenAI (GPT), Gemini, DeepSeek — depending on what each case requires.

items.title: Infrastructure
items.desc: Azure Functions, FastAPI, Docker containers — to run agents in production.

items.title: Evana — in development
items.desc: Intelligent assistant with agent orchestration. Active internal project.

cloud.title: Cloud Infrastructure
cloud.intro: Software needs a solid foundation. We design, implement, and operate cloud infrastructure for products that demand performance and availability.
cloud.desc: Azure, Supabase, serverless, containers. The right cloud for each product.

items.title: Cloud architecture
items.desc: We design the infrastructure each product needs. Scalable, secure, and cost-optimized.

items.title: Migrations
items.desc: We move existing systems to the cloud with planning and backup. Zero downtime.

items.title: Databases
items.desc: Supabase, Cosmos DB, PostgreSQL. We choose based on each application's access pattern.

items.title: Serverless and containers
items.desc: Azure Functions, Docker, CI/CD. We automate deploys and scale on demand.

items.title: Monitoring and operations
items.desc: Performance dashboards, alerts, centralized logs. Infrastructure is not abandoned.

items.title: New products
items.desc: If you're building from scratch, we help you choose and configure the cloud from day one.

items.title: Existing systems
items.desc: If your current infrastructure doesn't scale, we review and optimize it.

items.title: Azure expertise
items.desc: Azure Functions, Service Bus, Cosmos DB, Entra ID. Specialists in the Microsoft ecosystem.

items.title: Cost-focused
items.desc: We don't sell the most expensive cloud. We sell the one that solves the problem at the lowest possible cost.

items.title: Infrastructure as code
items.desc: Everything is configured with code. Reproducible, versioned, auditable.

header.name: CESAR PEREZ
header.role: Software Architect & Full-Stack Developer | AI & Cloud (Azure) Specialist | Founder @ NovaPage | Next.js, Python (FastAPI) & LangChain

summary.title: About
summary.intro: I am a Software Developer and Cloud Solutions Architect passionate about turning technical complexity into operational efficiency. With a strong focus on the Microsoft Azure ecosystem, I specialize in building high-performance applications and orchestrating AI agents to solve real-world business challenges.
summary.background: My background combines the technical rigor of Clean Architecture with the agility needed to take products from conception to production-ready deployments.
summary.currentRole: As the founder of NovaPage, I serve as a technology partner for companies seeking modernization. I don't just build software; I design the "engine" of the business: scalable architectures using Python and Next.js, AI-driven automation, and enterprise-grade security.
summary.stackCloud: Cloud & DevOps: Microsoft Azure (Functions, Cosmos DB, Service Bus), Docker, CI/CD
summary.stackAI: AI: Agent Orchestration (OpenAI, Gemini, LangChain, Autogen)
summary.cta: Whether I'm designing an ecosystem of intelligent agents or leading the migration of a legacy system to the cloud, my goal remains the same: creating robust technology that empowers decision-making and slashes operational costs.

cloud.title: Cloud Computing & DevOps
cloud.point1: Microsoft Azure (Azure Functions, Service Bus, Cosmos DB, Azure Web Pub Sub, domain and DNS management)
cloud.point4: Environment and resource management, monitoring (UptimeRobot, Mixpanel)

ai.title: AI & Automation
ai.point2: Automation with Make.com, n8n and Power Automate
ai.point3: Copilot and LLM assistant development (GPTs, Gemini, OpenAI)
ai.point4: Document processing and vectorization (downloads, extraction, indexing)
ai.point5: Code scaffolding and automatic testing with AI

backend.title: Backend Development
backend.point2: RESTful API design: pagination, security, documentation (Swagger)
backend.point3: Custom middlewares, token validation and refresh
backend.point4: Clean Architecture patterns (Router, Service, Repository, Client, Mapper)
backend.point5: Messaging: Azure Service Bus, SQS, topic patterns

frontend.title: Frontend Development
frontend.point2: Tailwind CSS, Bootstrap, dynamic layouts, i18n

database.title: Databases
database.point1: Cosmos DB: advanced NoSQL modeling, denormalization, embedding
database.point4: Redis usage and Singleton patterns for cache and performance

security.title: Security & Authentication
security.point1: Microsoft Entra ID/Azure AD: JWT, Scopes, redirections, SSO
security.point2: Row-level Security, role and permission management (Supabase/Azure)
security.point3: OAuth 2.0, OpenID Connect, header centralization in middleware
security.point4: Error testing and documentation, endpoint protection

architecture.title: Architecture & Code Quality
architecture.point1: Clean Architecture patterns, DTOs, DAOs, Mappers
architecture.point2: Separation and modular organization by entity
architecture.point3: Test-Driven Development (TDD), unit and integration testing
architecture.point4: Custom error management, logs, and best practices (PEP8, English)

job1.point1: Technical leadership in the design and implementation of scalable, secure architectures on Microsoft Azure (Functions, Cosmos DB, Service Bus, serverless resources).
job1.point2: Full-Stack development with Next.js, React, and Python/FastAPI, integrating automation workflows and intelligent data processing.
job1.point3: Orchestration of multi-agent systems and advanced integration of generative AI (OpenAI, Copilot, n8n, RPA, CrewAI) for optimization of internal processes and customer services.
job1.point4: Continuous improvement and implementation of CI/CD pipelines in Azure DevOps, automating validations, deployments, and monitoring.
job1.point5: Advanced enterprise authentication management and granular access control using Microsoft Entra ID, including security policies and protection of critical endpoints.
job1.point6: Rigorous application of Clean Architecture, TDD, observability (logs, traceability), and continuous refactoring to ensure code quality and maintainability.
job1.point7: Training, support, and mentoring to development teams in modern practices of AI, automation, and cloud, facilitating the adoption of new technologies.

job2.point1: Execution of Full-Stack web development projects using Next.js and Angular for modern, highly interactive applications.
job2.point2: Design and construction of relational and NoSQL databases, as well as integration of robust authentication and authorization systems using Supabase (Auth and Database).
job2.point3: Implementation of RESTful APIs and efficient management of states, data flows, and business logic on both frontend and backend.
job2.point4: Direct collaboration with clients for requirements gathering, MVP definition, and delivery of functional products under agile methodologies.
job2.point5: Deployment and maintenance of solutions, focusing on performance, scalability, and user experience.
job2.point6: Application of unit testing, version management (Git), and continuous integration workflows to ensure deliverable quality.
job2.point7: Development of responsive, accessible interfaces, visual experience design, and optimization of flows for mobile and desktop devices.

job3.point1: Development and optimization of advanced features in Vue.js and Nuxt.js for high-impact applications.
job3.point2: Translation of mockups and prototypes in Canva into functional interfaces, ensuring design coherence and usability.
job3.point3: Preparation of SQL queries and analytical reports in Excel for business decision-making.
job3.point4: Proactive management of IT incidents and comprehensive technical support to ensure system availability and operational continuity.

job4.point1: Development of a web platform for campaign statistics visualization using Angular and Laravel, with data integration in Firebase.
job4.point2: Design, editing, and publishing of visual resources and communication manuals for social networks and internal use.

job5.point1: Management and operation of professional photography and video equipment for corporate content production and events.
job5.point2: Editing, post-production, and delivery of high-quality audiovisual material using Photoshop, Premiere, and After Effects.

proj1.name: Full-Stack Web Platform with Advanced Authentication and Analytics (CourseWebsite)
proj1.description: Comprehensive development of a responsive web platform with Next.js and internal API for key functions. Includes a secure registration/login system managed with Supabase Auth, user metrics tracking in Supabase Database, and a CDN for efficient content delivery.
proj1.achievement1: Building modern and scalable web applications.
proj1.achievement2: Implementation of secure authentication and robust user flows.

proj2.name: Evana - Intelligent Family Assistant (AI Agent System)
proj2.description: Design and implementation of a modular architecture for an intelligent agent system (Autogen) capable of supporting complex tasks. Includes a FastAPI backend for the API, Azure Functions as serverless external tools for agents, and an Angular frontend (in development). This system demonstrates advanced AI orchestration for task automation and intelligent support.
proj2.achievement1: Design of complex agent-based AI systems.
proj2.achievement2: Development of scalable and secure backend.
proj2.achievement3: Advanced integration of serverless services as tools for AI.
proj2.achievement4: Professional version control and environment management.

education.selfLearning5: NoSQL Databases: advanced modeling in Cosmos DB and MongoDB.
